section.heading: Energy efficiency in federally assisted housing
section.chapeau: The Secretary of Housing and Urban Development shall promote energy conservation in housing that is located on Indian land and assisted with Federal resources through—

paragraph.content: the use of energy-efficient technologies and innovations (including the procurement of energy-efficient refrigerators and other appliances);
the promotion of shared savings contracts; and
the use and implementation of such other similar technologies and innovations as the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development considers to be appropriate.

note.heading: Short Title
note.p: For short title of title V of Pub. L. 109–58, which enacted this subchapter, as the “Indian Tribal Energy Development and Self-Determination Act of 2005”, see section 501 of Pub. L. 109–58, set out as a note under section 15801 of this title.
